topics.topic_ar: الفرق بين المجموعات (Sets) والحقائب (Multisets) في قواعد البيانات
topics.query_en: SQL sets vs multisets relational algebra tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح Sets and Multisets SQL قواعد بيانات
topics.reason: Students often struggle to understand how SQL treats tables as multisets (allowing duplicates) rather than strict mathematical sets, which fundamentally alters how query results are evaluated.

topics.topic_ar: الضرب الديكارتي (Cartesian Product) وغياب شرط WHERE
topics.query_en: SQL Cartesian product cross join explained
topics.query_ar: شرح Cartesian Product Cross Join SQL
topics.reason: Forgetting the WHERE clause or join condition leads to unintended Cartesian products, causing massive performance issues and confusing, exponentially large result sets.

topics.topic_en: Set and Multiset Operations (UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT)
topics.topic_ar: عمليات المجموعات في SQL (UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT)
topics.query_en: SQL set operations UNION INTERSECT EXCEPT tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح UNION INTERSECT EXCEPT SQL بالعربي
topics.reason: Combining multiple query results requires strict column data type matching and understanding the subtle logical differences between operations like UNION and UNION ALL.

topics.topic_en: Aliasing and Qualifying Attributes in Complex Queries
topics.topic_ar: الأسماء المستعارة (Aliasing) وتحديد الأعمدة في SQL
topics.query_en: SQL aliasing and qualifying attributes self join
topics.query_ar: شرح SQL Aliases and Table Qualifiers
topics.reason: Managing table aliases and qualifying attributes becomes highly confusing for beginners when dealing with self-joins or multiple tables sharing identical column names.

topics.query_en: SQL DML statements INSERT UPDATE DELETE tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح DML INSERT UPDATE DELETE SQL
topics.reason: Executing DML operations safely requires a solid understanding of referential integrity constraints, primary/foreign keys, and cascading effects to avoid accidental data corruption.
